onboarding_welcome_title: Manage Your Web3 Assets Anywhere, Anytime

Safe, Fast Transactions
onboarding_sub_title_1: Store, send, and receive multiple cryptocurrencies in one wallet with top-notch security and user-friendly experience.
onboarding_sub_title_2: Integrated with DeFi, NFT, and Web3 apps, unlocking blockchain potential without worrying about risks.
onboarding_sub_title_3: Instant transactions, full control of your assets, and multi-device sync – all in a single Web3 wallet.

send_dust_error_sub_title_2: - The amount of Bitcoin you are trying to send is too small (dust) and not sufficient to complete the transaction because the transaction fee exceeds the value of the amount. Please try again with a larger amount.
send_dust_error_sub_title: - Dust refers to a very small amount of Bitcoin that is usually not transactable because the transaction fee would be higher than the value of the amount. Sending such small amounts is not economically feasible, so a larger amount is required to complete the transaction.
